name: Chocolate Amaretto Truffles
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Julia Child Preparation Time: 0:30
Melt chocolate with Amaretto and espresso in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir until smooth. Remove the top of the double boiler from heat.
Whisk in butter, 1 tablespoon at a time until smooth. Add vanilla. Cover and refrigerate until firm, about 3 hours. Scoop mixture into rough round shapes. Roll in cocoa and place in paper cups. Store in refrigerator up to 3 days. Makes 3 dozen.
